name: Anthropic
summary: Anthropic was founded by Dario and Daniela Amodei, along with several other former OpenAI researchers, with a focus on AI safety research. The company developed Constitutional AI, a training methodology that uses a set of principles to guide model behavior rather than relying solely on human feedback. Anthropic's Claude model family represents a safety-first approach to frontier AI development. The company has become one of the leading AI labs and a major voice in responsible AI scaling.
